name: LED A21 Bulb – 15 Watt – Energy Star and UL listed.
description: ZION LED USA A21 bulb is an energy-efficient lighting option that uses only 15 watts of power but provides the same brightness as a 110 watt incandescent bulb. Our A21 emits a cool white light with a 6500K color temperature, making it suitable for spaces where bright, natural-looking light is needed.
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 15 Watts Lumen: 1600 Lm Lumens Efficacy: 106LM/Watt Adjustable CCT: 6500 K Dimmable: Yes Housing Color: White Base Type: E26 Operating Temperature: -4F TO 113 F Watt Equivalent: 110W Beam Angle: 230 D Outdoor Rated: No Height: 4.2 IN Weight: 0.15 LBS Power Factor: 0.9 Certification: UL Listed CRI: >80 Diameter: 2.4 Dimension: 4.7*2.78 Life Hours: 50000 Application: Indoor Voltage: 120V AC Warranty: 1 year
